title: IAMMAI State Record
description: First bounded schema for canonical state records only. It preserves preparation and standing state identity without collapsing containment, lineage, transition, witness, validation, governance, or derivative display state into a generic status field or convenience container.

state_id.description: Stable identifier for the canonical state record.

matter_ref.description: Reference to the bounded matter within which the state stands.

state_family.description: Canonical state family. This governs primary state identity only and does not encode containment or resolution as family.

state_type.description: Canonical state identity bounded by the selected state family. HOLD and generic status values are not valid state identities.

recorded_at.description: Time at which the canonical state record was recorded.

predecessor_ref.description: Optional primary lineage reference to the prior state where lineage-bearing succession applies.

related_transition_ref.description: Optional bounded reference to a related transition record. Transition remains distinct from canonical state identity.

related_governance_action_ref.description: Optional bounded reference to a related governance action record. Governance remains distinct from canonical state identity.

related_validation_ref.description: Optional bounded reference to a related validation artifact. Validation remains distinct from canonical state identity.

related_witness_ref.description: Optional bounded reference to a related witness artifact. Witness remains distinct from canonical state identity.

containment_ref.description: Optional bounded reference to orthogonal containment. This does not replace canonical state identity.

notes_ref.description: Optional reference to bounded supporting notes or related supporting material.
